Defines constants for launcher menu layer cell dimensions and visibility based on platform and display type.

# Purpose
This C header file defines several preprocessor macros related to the layout of a launcher menu layer, which is likely part of a user interface. The file includes conditional compilation directives to set different values for `LAUNCHER_MENU_LAYER_CELL_RECT_CELL_HEIGHT` based on the `PLATFORM_ROBERT` macro, allowing for platform-specific customization. It also defines constants for the heights of focused and unfocused cells in a round display configuration. Additionally, the file uses conditional logic to determine the number of visible rows in the menu layer, with a specific configuration for round displays (`PBL_ROUND`) and a calculated value for other displays using the `DIVIDE_CEIL` macro from the included `util/math.h` file.
# Imports and Dependencies

---
- `util/math.h`
